title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud infrastructure, potentially leading to service disruptions, data breaches, and financial losses. The use of compromised CI/CD pipelines increases the risk of widespread and rapid deployment of the ransomware.
recommended_actions: Immediately review and secure CI/CD pipelines by implementing multi-factor authentication (MFA), access controls, and regular security audits.
Deploy endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to monitor and mitigate potential ransomware activities in cloud environments.
Ensure regular backups of critical data are stored offline or in secure, immutable storage, and test recovery procedures to minimize downtime.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: libp2p-gossipsub: Remote crash via unchecked Instant overflow in heartbeat backoff expiry handling
description:
## Description
### Summary
The Rust libp2p Gossipsub implementation contains a remotely reachable panic in `backoff` expiry handling.  
After a peer sends a crafted `PRUNE` control message with an attacker-controlled, near-maximum `backoff` value, the value is accepted and stored as an `Instant` near the representable upper bound. On a later heartbeat, the implementation performs unchecked `Instant + Duration` arithmetic (`backoff_time + slack`), which can overflow and panic with:
`overflow when

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Rust libp2p Gossipsub implementation allows remote attackers to cause a panic by exploiting unchecked arithmetic operations. This can lead to denial-of-service (DoS) attacks, disrupting peer-to-peer communications and potentially impacting systems relying on decentralized protocols.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to the latest patched version of the Rust libp2p Gossipsub library that addresses CVE-2026-34219.
Implement input validation to sanitize and restrict attacker-controlled values, particularly for `PRUNE` control messages.
Monitor network traffic for unusual or malicious activity targeting the Gossipsub protocol, and deploy mitigations such as rate-limiting or anomaly detection.

title: Navicat for Oracle 12.1.15 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers...
description: Navicat for Oracle 12.1.15 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by supplying an excessively long string in the password field. Attackers can paste a buffer of 550 repeated characters into the password parameter during Oracle connection configuration to trigger an application crash.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2019-25653.

title: SmartFTP Client 9.0.2615.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers...
description: SmartFTP Client 9.0.2615.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by supplying an excessively long string in the Host field. Attackers can paste a buffer of 300 repeated characters into the Host connection parameter to trigger an application crash.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows local attackers to crash the SmartFTP Client application by exploiting a denial of service condition, potentially disrupting workflows but without remote exploitation or data compromise.
recommended_actions: Update SmartFTP Client to the latest version if a patch is available.
Restrict local access to trusted users to minimize the risk of exploitation.
Monitor vendor advisories for any updates or patches addressing CVE-2018-25234.

title: Device Monitoring Studio 8.10.00.8925 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows...
description: Device Monitoring Studio 8.10.00.8925 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by supplying an excessively long string to the server connection dialog. Attackers can trigger the crash by entering a malformed server name or address containing repeated characters through the Tools menu Connect to New Server interface.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2019-25655.

title: Softros LAN Messenger 9.2 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers...
description: Softros LAN Messenger 9.2 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to crash the application by supplying an excessively long string to the custom log files location field. Attackers can input a buffer of 2000 characters in the Log Files Location custom path parameter to trigger a crash when the OK button is clicked.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows local attackers to crash the Softros LAN Messenger application, potentially disrupting communication within an organization. However, it does not allow remote exploitation or privilege escalation, limiting its overall impact.
recommended_actions: Update to the latest version of Softros LAN Messenger if a patch is available to address CVE-2018-25232.
Restrict physical and local access to trusted personnel to minimize the risk of exploitation.
Implement monitoring to detect and respond to unusual application crashes or behavior.

title: WebDrive 18.00.5057 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows local attackers to...

recommended_actions: Update to the latest version of WebDrive to ensure the vulnerability is patched.
Implement input validation and sanitization to prevent buffer overflow attacks.
Restrict local access to trusted users and monitor for unusual activity.

title: A sensitive information exposure vulnerability exists in ArthurFiorette steam-trader 2.1.1. An...
description: A sensitive information exposure vulnerability exists in ArthurFiorette steam-trader 2.1.1. An unauthenticated attacker can send a request to the /users API endpoint to retrieve highly sensitive Steam account data, including the account username, password, identity secret, and shared secret. In addition, application logs expose authentication artifacts such as access tokens, refresh tokens, and session identifiers. This information allows an attacker to generate valid Steam Guard (2FA) codes, hi

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to access sensitive Steam account data, including credentials, two-factor authentication secrets, and session tokens. Exploitation could lead to account takeovers, unauthorized transactions, and potential financial or reputational damage to users and organizations utilizing the application.
recommended_actions: Immediately update or patch the application to address the vulnerability in the /users API endpoint and secure sensitive data exposure.
Revoke and regenerate all exposed authentication artifacts, including access tokens, refresh tokens, and session identifiers.
Implement logging best practices to ensure sensitive information is not stored or exposed in application logs.

title: BulletProof FTP Server 2019.0.0.50 contains a denial of service vulnerability in the SMTP...
description: BulletProof FTP Server 2019.0.0.50 contains a denial of service vulnerability in the SMTP configuration interface that allows local attackers to crash the application by supplying an oversized string. Attackers can input a buffer of 257 'A' characters in the SMTP Server field and trigger a crash by clicking the Test button.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows local attackers to crash the BulletProof FTP Server application by exploiting a denial of service (DoS) flaw in the SMTP configuration interface. This could disrupt operations and require manual intervention to restore services, but it does not allow remote exploitation or data exfiltration.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Businesses (SMBs) using FTP servers
recommended_actions: Update to the latest version of BulletProof FTP Server if a patch is available.
Restrict local access to the server to trusted personnel only to minimize the risk of exploitation.
Implement monitoring and logging to detect unusual activity or application crashes for faster incident response.

title: AL-KO Robolinho Update Software has hard-coded AWS Access and Secret keys that allow anyone to...
description:
AL-KO Robolinho Update Software has hard-coded AWS Access and Secret keys that allow anyone to access AL-KO's AWS bucket. Using the keys directly might give the attacker greater access than the app itself. Key grants AT LEAST read access to some of the objects in bucket.

The vendor was notified early about this vulnerability, but didn't respond with the details of vulnerability or vulnerable version range. Only versions 8.0.21.0610 was tested and confirmed as vulnerable, other versions were not

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The hard-coded AWS access and secret keys in the AL-KO Robolinho Update Software could allow unauthorized access to AL-KO's AWS bucket. This may lead to data exposure, unauthorized data manipulation, or potential escalation of privileges if the keys provide broader access than initially observed.
recommended_actions: Immediately rotate and revoke the exposed AWS access and secret keys to prevent unauthorized access.
Implement secure coding practices to avoid hard-coding sensitive credentials in software and use environment variables or secure secret management solutions instead.
Conduct a comprehensive security audit of all versions of the software to identify and address similar vulnerabilities.

title: An integer overflow vulnerability in the HTTP chunked transfer encoding parser in tinyproxy up to...
description: An integer overflow vulnerability in the HTTP chunked transfer encoding parser in tinyproxy up to and including version 1.11.3 allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to cause a denial of service (DoS). The issue occurs because chunk size values are parsed using strtol() without properly validating overflow conditions (e.g., errno == ERANGE). A crafted chunk size such as 0x7fffffffffffffff (LONG_MAX) bypasses the existing validation check (chunklen < 0), leading to a signed integer overflow du

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3945.

title: A flaw was found in libarchive. On 32-bit systems, an integer overflow vulnerability exists in...
description: A flaw was found in libarchive. On 32-bit systems, an integer overflow vulnerability exists in the zisofs block pointer allocation logic. A remote attacker can exploit this by providing a specially crafted ISO9660 image, which can lead to a heap buffer overflow. This could potentially allow for arbitrary code execution on the affected system.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in libarchive could allow a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code on 32-bit systems by exploiting a heap buffer overflow, potentially leading to system compromise or unauthorized access.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patches or updates for libarchive as soon as they are released by the vendor.
Implement input validation and filtering mechanisms to prevent the processing of untrusted or malicious ISO9660 images.
Monitor systems for unusual activity or signs of exploitation, and consider implementing additional runtime protections such as Address Space Layout Randomization (ASLR) and stack canaries.

title: Gigabyte Control Center developed by GIGABYTE has an Arbitrary File Write vulnerability. When the...
description: Gigabyte Control Center developed by GIGABYTE has an Arbitrary File Write vulnerability. When the pairing feature is enabled, unauthenticated remote attackers can write arbitrary files to any location on the underlying operating system, leading to arbitrary code execution or privilege escalation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4415.

title: CVE-2025-10679 - The ReviewX – WooCommerce Product Reviews with Multi-Criteria, Reminder Emails, Google Reviews, Sche
description: The ReviewX – WooCommerce Product Reviews with Multi-Criteria, Reminder Emails, Google Reviews, Schema & More plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary method calls in all versions up to, and including, 2.2.12. This is due to insufficient input validation in the bulkTenReviews function that allows user-controlled data to be passed directly to a variable function call mechanism. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to call arbitrary PHP class methods that take no inputs or have default values, potentially leading to information disclosure or remote code execution depending on available methods and server configuration.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2025-10679.

title: CVE-2026-4572 - A weakness has been identified in SourceCodester Sales and Inventory System 1.0. Affected by this is
description: A weakness has been identified in SourceCodester Sales and Inventory System 1.0. Affected by this issue is some unknown functionality of the file /view_product.php of the component HTTP POST Request Handler. Executing a manipulation of the argument searchtxt can lead to sql injection. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The identified SQL injection vulnerability in SourceCodester Sales and Inventory System 1.0 could allow attackers to manipulate database queries, potentially leading to unauthorized data access, data leakage, or database corruption. Since the exploit is publicly available, the risk of exploitation is heightened.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input validation and sanitization for the 'searchtxt' parameter to prevent SQL injection.
Update or patch the SourceCodester Sales and Inventory System to the latest version if a fix is available.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious HTTP POST requests targeting this vulnerability.

title: CVE-2026-4606 - GV Edge Recording Manager (ERM) v2.3.1 improperly runs application components with SYSTEM-level priv
description:
GV Edge Recording Manager (ERM) v2.3.1 improperly runs application components with SYSTEM-level privileges, allowing any local user to gain full control of the operating system. 

During installation, ERM creates a Windows service that runs under the LocalSystem account. 

When the ERM application is launched, related processes are spawned under SYSTEM privileges rather than the security context of the logged-in user. 

Functions such as 'Import Data' open a Windows file dialog operating with SYSTEM permissions, enabling modification or deletion of protected system files and directories. 

Any ERM function invoking Windows file open/save dialogs exposes the same risk. 

This vulnerability allows local privilege escalation and may result in full system compromise.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4606.

title: CVE-2026-2580 - The WP Maps – Store Locator,Google Maps,OpenStreetMap,Mapbox,Listing,Directory & Filters plugin for
description: The WP Maps – Store Locator,Google Maps,OpenStreetMap,Mapbox,Listing,Directory & Filters plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to time-based SQL Injection via the ‘orderby’ parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.9.1 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query.  This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive information from the database.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-2580.
